data.title: Alibaba roles out another AI tool for marketplace sellers
data.description: Pic Copilot offers 12 AI tools that simplify tasks such as swapping image backgrounds, enhancing photos and videos, enabling virtual try-ons, and generating ad visuals.

data.title: Insider secures $500 million investment to expand B2B and B2C AI marketing applications
data.description: With a fresh $500 million investment from General Atlantic, Insider plans to boost its brand awareness and enhance its operations globally.

data.title: Number of Cyber 5 shoppers dips in 2024
data.description: The number of U.S. consumers who shopped in physical stores during the 2024 Cyber 5 outnumbered last year, but it was the opposite online.

data.title: Why digital B2B buyers are frustrated — and what sellers must do to fix it
data.description: A significant 87% of Millennial and Generation Z buyers (born in 1981 or later) report dissatisfaction in at least one area, compared to 73% of older buyers (Generation X and Baby Boomers, born before 1981).

data.title: Air freight tonnage soars with ecommerce growth
data.description: The rapid expansion of ecommerce and express logistics networks is poised to significantly boost air cargo demand. The entry of fresh players into the ecommerce market accelerated this growth in late 2023 and continues to underscore the critical role of air freight in the digital economy, where speed is paramount, Boeing says.
